chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1202 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.5039/2023 (Stay/App) 3. For hearing of main case 10.10.2023 Mr. Shabir Hussain Talput, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Raza Soomro, Advocate for respondent No.7. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with SIP Manzoor Ali Siyal of Police Station Jam Dattar, District Shaheed Benazirabad..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Investigating Officer has filed a report in compliance of last order, wherein it has been stated that petitioner No.1, prima facie, has contracted marriage during life time of her first husband without getting divorce from him and her claim that she contracted marriage with petitioner No.2 after getting divorce is not sustainable. Hence, he has submitted the Challan before concerned Court. Facing such situation, learned Counsel for petitioners does not press this petition and submits that he would avail remedy in accordance with law. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of along with listed application, in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
